seo.title: Peal Paced Track Club — Premium Coaching for Driven Runners
seo.description: PPTC helps runners train with purpose through personalized coaching, structured plans, and a supportive, high‑performance community.

hero.headline: Run with purpose.</br>Train with clarity.
hero.subheadline: Guidance that simplifies the process and strengthens your stride

cta.headline: Ready to run?
cta.description: Whether you’re just starting out or looking to break through to the next level, I’m here to help you run smarter, stay consistent, and enjoy the process. Let’s build a plan that fits your life and gets you where you want to go.

services.title: Personalized Training Path
services.description: A plan built around your life, not someone else’s pace. We map out clear weekly steps, adjust for real-world demands, and build a rhythm you can actually sustain. Consistency becomes automatic when the plan fits who you are.

services.title: Purposeful Workouts
services.description: Every run has a job. Easy days build your engine, workouts sharpen your speed, and recovery keeps you progressing. You will always know why you are doing something and how it moves you forward.

services.title: Measurable, Momentum-Building Progress
services.description: We track the right metrics, celebrate the right wins, and refine the plan as you grow. Small improvements stack into breakthroughs when you follow a system designed for long-term success.

training_packages.title: Base Training-$35/month
training_packages.tagline: For the athlete looking to get started or wanting more structure and guidance in their training.
training_packages.description: Build aerobic strength, consistency, and foundational fitness with structured easy runs and basic foundational workouts. Featuring Easy run consistency, aerobic development, aerobic strength workouts and long runs.

training_packages.title: Race Prep-$50/month
training_packages.tagline: Dial in pacing, workouts, and long-run structure specific for your goal race pace.
training_packages.description: This package includes weekly feedback, zoom meetings, or phone calls with Coach Peal to create goals and specific race plans for your target race.

training_packages.title: Premier Training Program-$75/month
training_packages.tagline: For the athlete looking for more; whether you are looking to qualify for the Boston Marathon, run Boston or qualify for State in Tack or XC.
training_packages.description: This plan features high touch coaching with detailed feedback, data review, and adaptive weekly adjustments to prep you for your goal races that matter.

gallery.caption: Peal leading a group run in the park.
A training session focused on speed work.
Celebrating a successful race finish with the team.

about.headline: Meet Coach Peal
about.description: Coach Peal brings 15 years of personal running experience at the high school, college, and sub-elite levels. In his own running career, Coach Peal has run every distance from the 5K to the marathon, finishing seven marathons — including Boston twice. In his coaching career, Coach Peal has guided athletes to all-conference, all-regional, and all-state accolades, including a state championship. He is even more proud of helping athletes go on to compete collegiately at every level. Peal Paced Track Club is his way of sharing that passion with every athlete, no matter where they are on their running journey.

items.text: Clean, modern, and fast. Exactly what we needed.
items.author: James R.

form.headline: Get in Touch
form.description: Have questions or ready to start your training journey? Send me a message and I’ll get back to you as soon as possible.
